properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 72/14 

NORWEGIAN SEA
SEISMIC VESSEL WG TASMAN CALL SIGN 5BPB2  IS CONDUCTINING SEISIMIC SURVEY     
                                  
NAVIGATIONAL WARNING COORDINATES:
66-26,0N 008 10,0E
66 15,0N 008 41,0E
66 00,0N 008 15,0E
66 07,0N 007 53,0E

WG TASMAN IS TOWING 8 SEISMIC STREAMERS 5500 M IN LENGHT MARKED BY A BUOY WITH A FLASHING LIGHT AND RADAR REFLEKTOR.
RESTRICTED MANEUVERABILITY, OTHER VESSELS ARE REQUESTED TO GIVE WIDE BERTH. CPA`S OF AT LEAST 2 NM AHEAD AND ON THE SIDES AND 4 NM AT THE STERN REQUESTED
TWO SEISMIC SUPPORT VESSELS, DINA ALLIANCE AND MAINPORT KELLS WILL BE IN THE VICINITY FOR THE DURATION.
DURATION OF SURVEY IS EXPECTED FROM JUNE 27 2014. TO JULY 16 2014
